Tesla Expands Robotaxi Service To Orlando, Tampa A Day Before Earnings Report

headlines.desc: The Financial Select Sector Index trades at roughly 15.5 times forward earnings — about a turn and a quarter cheaper than where it stood in 2024.

headlines.title: Hormuz relief may not ease the economic toll that's already 'baked in,' analysts warn
headlines.desc: Early signs of reopening of the Strait of Hormuz have lifted the most acute threat to global energy supplies but economic damages from the war will take months to unwind.

headlines.title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
headlines.desc: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.

headlines.title: Shipping rebounds in Strait of Hormuz one week after U.S.-Iran deal – but fragile confidence threatens recovery
headlines.desc: Shipping traffic through the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz is recovering one week after the U.S. and Iran signed an interim peace deal.

headlines.title: Here's how SpaceX's Nasdaq-100 inclusion might affect options pricing
headlines.desc: About half-a-million SpaceX options traded by midday Monday, a little below the average since inception.

headlines.title: India's inflation accelerates to 4.38% in June, exceeding forecasts
headlines.desc: Inflation has risen for the eighth straight month in India, as food and energy prices rise due to the Iran war and deficient rainfall.

headlines.title: Traders are betting on a comeback quarter for Netflix
headlines.desc: Options traders are striking a decidedly bullish tone heading into the streaming giant's earnings on Thursday.

headlines.title: Oil volatility is creating a 'win-win' trade strategy
headlines.desc: The United States Oil Fund (USO), the ETF that best tracks oil prices, offers equity options traders a liquid, accessible alternative to the complexities of the futures market.

headlines.title: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
headlines.desc: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for boosting portfolio returns
headlines.desc: With thousands of dividend-paying companies to choose from, identifying the right stocks can be challenging.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about these 3 stocks for the long haul
headlines.desc: Those looking for attractive stock picks amid the ongoing volatility can gain key insights by tracking the recommendations of top Wall Street analysts.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 dividend stocks for steady income
headlines.desc: Here are three dividend-paying stocks that are highlighted by Wall Street's top pros, as tracked by TipRanks.

headlines.title: World Cup could boost the June jobs report by 40,000, Goldman estimates
headlines.desc: Nonfarm payrolls are projected to post a gain of 115,000, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: Tech bulls lose conviction as key trading metric blows out to the widest since 2008
headlines.desc: The pick-up in demand for puts aligns with slowing momentum in AI stocks that had been consistently rewarding speculators to the upside.
